digest.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
digest.tldr: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

digest.title: Show HN: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization language for AI agents
Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
digest.tldr: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

digest.title: Breaking Ground on Meta’s First Data Center in Canada
digest.tldr: We’re breaking ground on a new 1GW, AI-optimized data center in Sturgeon County, Alberta — our first data center in Canada and 33rd in our global fleet.  The post Breaking Ground on Meta’s First Data Center in Canada…
